message: Sync audit ledger with CFD remediation issue counts.
Publish 5000-step Phase 4 BKM monitor (BKM ≈ 4.45 at t=5).
Add automated link checker and fix broken published URLs.
Document Phase 4 Taylor-Green benchmark and 512³ VRAM ceiling.
Add Phase 4 extended 256³ BKM run results to 3D finding.
Publish 3D NS BKM infrastructure finding and Phase 4 blowup-search data.
Fix finding frontmatter duplicate data keys and NS BKM cuda link.
Publish CFD Phase 2/3 experiments and silver BKM finding.
Link CFD finding to Hugging Face dataset and validation data.
Add claim validation section for maximal Lyapunov exponent wording.
